title: Advanced Tactics & Combinations
description: Forks, discovered attacks, and sacrifices on the hex board

steps.title: The Fork
steps.instruction: Find a move that attacks two enemy pieces at once
steps.explanation: A fork is extremely powerful because the opponent can only save one piece.
steps.hint: Use the Vizier's long reach to land on the fork square.
steps.mistakeFeedback: Look for the move that creates pressure on two enemy pieces at once.
steps.teaching_moment: Look for pieces that control both side and vertex lines.
